text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since I removed the
Kikuka Sho from Eishin Flash's schedule, but she
still seems a bit lost.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: My training schedule requires changes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This was originally designed for long-distance
running to prepare for the Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, except I do not know how. Changing a single
element could cause a total upheaval.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, there is still a chance I may yet
run in the Kikuka Sho...
choice_data_list: Then why don't we keep the program as is?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: As in continue training for long-distance races?
choice_data_list: It's good practice for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, but I need time to think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For better or worse, she has a one-track mind.
Now that her schedule's off, she won't be able to
move forward without some major convincing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She needs an experience that can give her a new
perspective. I think back on her run with Mr. C.B.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mr. C.B. gave Eishin Flash invaluable experience
by running with her ahead of the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, Flash might need to experience
another setback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just then, a lively voice fills the air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! This is easy peasy! ♪ Bring me some
heavier dumbbells!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Who am I? The Invincible Teio, that's who!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the title fits her. Tokai Teio took on the
Classic Triple Crown with a flawless record and
got so far as claiming two crowns, but an injury
kept her out of the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I ask her if she could have a word with
Eishin Flash, she agrees without missing a beat.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So you wanna know how I felt when I dropped out
of the Kikuka Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this isn't—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it, Flash. I agreed to this myself, so
it's all good.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course, things were real tough when it
happened.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
There's someone who's really, really important to
me, y'know. Can you guess who?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
President Symboli Rudolf, I presume. I often see
the two of you together.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Bingo! The reason why I wanted to win the Triple
Crown was because I wanted to be just like Prez.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I was on a roll, too! I got to the Derby
without a single loss, won it, and even got praised
by Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And then, poof! I couldn't run in the last race and
my dream went up in smoke.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yet you still race, even now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
How were you able to regain your footing after
being thrown off the path you were following?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I asked myself what Prez would do in my cleats.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She'd never, ever give up. Prez would keep
looking forward and keep marching on.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So that's what I did.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to look bad in front of the person I
admire!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The person you admire...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Why did you decide to share all of this with me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's easy.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Cause Prez woulda done the same!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After parting ways with Tokai Teio...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I have no idea...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What those I admire—what my parents would do
in my position. The thought never occurred to me
at the time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to become just like them, so I adhered
to my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yet in the end, all I was doing was mimicking their
methods.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've strayed from their way of doing
things, I don't know how my parents would handle
this situation.
choice_data_list: Then how about asking yourself what they wouldn't do?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
Thinking about it the other way around might
help.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What would they absolutely not do? That would
be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer. In regards to my next race...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Would it be possible to run in the Japan Cup a
year earlier than scheduled?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Runners from all over the world come to compete
in the Japan Cup, and it goes without saying that
only the best of the best take part in it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I gave your suggestion some thought—about what
the people I admire, namely my parents, would
not do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They would not abandon their path. Most likely,
they would attempt to carry out course
corrections.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The reason I reached this conclusion is because it
isn't right to completely scrap a timetable once it
has been created.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, for me to correct for the course, I must
seek a parallel route that will lead me through the
same difficulties as the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is the same length as the Derby
and is held in the same venue. I've already run
that race, so I should be able to recover in a
month.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Since the greats of my generation are focused on
the fall races, I would be up against senior year
opponents.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even if I do race in the Kikuka Sho, I should take
on this challenge to compensate for the days I've
wasted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Japan Cup is extremely competitive, but...
choice_data_list:
I know you can hold your own, even against
senior racers.

I know you can hold your own, even against
senior racers.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Now let's come up with a strategy so I
don't have to eat my words.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It seems I am in your debt once again.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To tell the truth, I was completely lost and had no
idea how to move forward...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But getting exposure to alternative perspectives,
such as when I faced against C.B., helped bring
clarity and understanding.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I tend to get mired in my own thoughts, so I
appreciate the outside input.
choice_data_list:
Your strengths more than make up for the
overthinking.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Eishin Flash adopts a positive mindset
while preparing for the Japan Cup.
